name: Palm Coast / Flagler County — ZIP 32137
notes: Client criteria for the East Florida demo. Used to seed scrape + post-scrape lead filtering. Tune as criteria firm up.

leadFilters.comment_residential: Keep DOR/use codes for residential + rural/agricultural-residential; drop commercial/industrial.
